template.name: Real-Time Data Streaming & Processing Pipeline
template.description: High-throughput real-time data streaming pipeline with Apache Kafka integration, stream processing, windowing operations, and real-time analytics. Handles millions of events per minute with low latency.

documentation.setup_guide:
1. Set up Kafka cluster and create topics
2. Configure Redis for real-time caching
3. Set up PostgreSQL for persistent storage
4. Configure WebSocket endpoint for real-time updates
5. Define validation and transformation rules
6. Set up anomaly detection thresholds
7. Test with sample stream data
use_cases: IoT sensor data processing and analytics
Financial transaction monitoring and fraud detection
Social media sentiment analysis and trending
E-commerce user behavior tracking and personalization

troubleshooting.high_latency: Check Kafka consumer lag and increase parallelism
troubleshooting.memory_issues: Reduce window size or implement data sampling
troubleshooting.validation_failures: Review data schema and validation rules
